text:
MAJOR_PROCS_INGRP 
 Total costs for major procedures billed by EPs in practice 

 TOTAL_PA 
 Total costs for other post-acute care services (excluding hospice) 

 OP_THERAPY 
 Total costs for outpatient physical therapy, occupational therapy, or speech and language pathology therapy 

 CCN 
 CCN of hospital at which hospitalization occurred 

 RADM30 
 Hospital readmission within 30 days 

 DGNSCD01 
 Primary diagnosis code for hospital admission 

 SHORT_DESCRIPTION 
 Description of
